name: Kbd
visual_summary: The Kbd component displays text in a keyboard font, which is typically used for denoting keyboard keys or other on-screen keyboard-like input methods. It is commonly used when the value of a variable or function argument should be visually emphasized as a key. This can be useful in interactive documentation and tutorials.
